sentences.target: Ils dépouillent les bulletins ce soir.

translations.fr: Ils dépouillent les bulletins ce soir.
translations.de: Sie zählen heute Abend die Stimmzettel aus.
translations.pt: Eles vão apurar os votos esta noite.
translations.hi: वे आज रात मतों की गिनती कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I kveld teller de opp stemmene.
translations.id: Malam ini mereka menghitung surat suara.
translations.ro: În seara asta numără buletinele de vot.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed); syntactic subject of the finite verb.
Present indicative, 3rd person plural; main predicate. Here means to count/scrutinize ballots in an election context.
Definite article, plural; introduces the noun 'bulletins' as part of the direct object NP.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'dépouillent', referring to voting papers.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'soir'; forms a temporal NP functioning as an adverbial.
Common noun; head of the temporal NP 'ce soir', an adverbial time complement.

sentences.target: Je dois dépouiller ces dossiers aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Je dois dépouiller ces dossiers aujourd'hui.
translations.en: I have to go through these files today.
translations.es: Hoy tengo que revisar estos expedientes.
translations.de: Ich muss diese Akten heute durchgehen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天得把这些文件过一遍。
translations.yue: 我今日要睇晒呢啲文件。
translations.ru: Мне сегодня нужно разобрать эти дела.
translations.he: אני צריך לעבור על התיקים האלה היום.
translations.tr: Bugün bu dosyaları gözden geçirmek zorundayım.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi phải xem qua những hồ sơ này.
translations.ar: عليّ أن أراجع هذه الملفات اليوم.
translations.nl: Ik moet deze dossiers vandaag doornemen.
translations.uk: Мені сьогодні треба переглянути ці справи.
translations.hu: Ma át kell néznem ezeket az aktákat.
translations.hi: मुझे आज इन फ़ाइलों को देखना है.
translations.el: Σήμερα πρέπει να εξετάσω αυτά τα αρχεία.
translations.nb: Jeg må gå gjennom disse filene i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini saya harus meninjau berkas-berkas ini.
translations.sv: Jag måste gå igenom de här akterna i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi trebuie să trec prin aceste dosare.
translations.da: Jeg skal gennemgå disse sager i dag.
translations.fi: Minun pitää käydä nämä asiakirjat läpi tänään.
translations.ja: 今日はこれらのファイルに目を通さないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'dois'.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of the modal verb; expresses obligation and selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'dois'. Here means to examine/process files.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies 'dossiers' as the direct object of the infinitive.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'dépouiller'.
Temporal adverb; specifies when the action is to be done.

translations.yue: 喺呢度佢哋會打劫遊客。
translations.vi: Ở đây họ cướp du khách.
translations.hi: यहाँ वे पर्यटकों को लूटते हैं.
translations.ja: ここでは観光客が強盗に遭います。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of the finite verb.
Present indicative, 3rd person plural; main predicate. Here means to strip/rob people of their belongings.
Definite article, plural; introduces 'touristes' as the direct object NP.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'dépouillent', denoting the victims.
Locative adverb; indicates the place where the action occurs.

sentences.target: Nous dépouillons le lapin pour le dîner.
sentences.reading: /nu depujɔ̃ lə lapɛ̃ puʁ lə dine/

translations.fr: Nous dépouillons le lapin pour le dîner.
translations.ipa: /nu depujɔ̃ lə lapɛ̃ puʁ lə dine/
translations.en: We’re skinning the rabbit for dinner.
translations.es: Estamos desollando el conejo para la cena.
translations.de: Wir häuten das Kaninchen zum Abendessen.
translations.it: Scuoiamo il coniglio per la cena.
translations.ko: 저녁 식사를 위해 토끼의 가죽을 벗기고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在为晚餐给兔子剥皮。
translations.yue: 我哋為咗晚餐喺度剝兔皮。
translations.ru: Мы снимаем шкуру с кролика на ужин.
translations.pt: Estamos esfolando o coelho para o jantar.
translations.he: אנחנו מפשיטים את הארנב לארוחת ערב.
translations.tr: Akşam yemeği için tavşanın derisini yüzüyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang lột da thỏ để nấu bữa tối.
translations.nl: We villen het konijn voor het avondeten.
translations.uk: Ми знімаємо шкуру з кролика на вечерю.
translations.hi: हम रात के खाने के लिए खरगोश की खाल उतार रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Ściągamy skórę z królika na kolację.
translations.el: Γδέρνουμε το κουνέλι για το δείπνο.
translations.id: Kami sedang menguliti kelinci untuk makan malam.
translations.cs: Stahujeme králíka z kůže na večeři.
translations.ja: 夕食のためにウサギの皮をはいでいます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the finite verb.
Present indicative, 1st person plural; main predicate. Here means to skin an animal.
Definite article, singular; introduces 'lapin' as the direct object NP.
Common noun, singular; direct object of 'dépouillons'.
Preposition introducing a purpose complement ('le dîner').
Definite article, singular; modifies 'dîner' within the prepositional phrase.
Common noun, singular; object of the preposition 'pour' in the PP 'pour le dîner'.

Je dois dépouiller ces dossiers aujourd'hui.
Nous dépouillons le lapin pour le dîner.
fu: /nu depujɔ̃ lə lapɛ̃ puʁ lə dine/

ipa: /nu depujɔ̃ lə lapɛ̃ puʁ lə dine/
en: I have to go through these files today.
We’re skinning the rabbit for dinner.
